subcodes.first_line: O steadfast supporter of the Covenant! From the regions of Adhirbayjan cometh news of the radiant spreading of the light of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حامی میثاق از اطراف آذربایجان خبر میدهند که در نشر میثاق نور اشراقی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
